deposit_account_no.text: เลขที่บัญชี

root.sql: SELECT vr_nsk_015_010000.monthly_date, vr_nsk_015_010000.deposit_account_no, vr_nsk_015_010000.item_type, vr_nsk_015_010000.membership_no, vr_nsk_015_010000.deposit_type_code, vr_nsk_015_010000.deposit_name, vr_nsk_015_010000.memname, vr_nsk_015_010000.accumulate_interest, vr_nsk_015_010000.last_calcint_date, vr_nsk_015_010000.deposit_balance, vr_nsk_015_010000.int_arrear, vr_nsk_015_010000.arrear_date FROM vr_nsk_015_010000 ,sc_dep_m_rule ,sc_dep_m_creditor where 1=1 and vr_nsk_015_010000.monthly_date = '!monthly_date_1!' and vr_nsk_015_010000.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code and vr_nsk_015_010000.deposit_account_no = sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no /*WHERE*/
